高普：紅軍爭標夢未碎


利物浦近況欠佳，至昨日僅與紐卡素踼成1：1後，暫時以12分列聯賽第7位。不過領隊高普相信球隊有力撥亂反正，最後與曼聯及曼城等強隊爭奪英超錦標。

「紅軍」近日後防失誤連連，昨日面對紐卡素雖有菲臘比古天奴先開紀錄，不過最終仍未能全取3分，近7戰僅獲1勝。對於球隊近況欠佳，高普指每一隊都會遇上低潮，堅信他們仍有力爭標：「我們離真正的挑戰不遠了。只要我們繼續發揮長處多入幾球，便能收窄積分差距，也不用擔心其他球隊的表現。我們目前遇到了低潮，但其他球隊亦會面對同樣問題。」

高普又指球員們未有信心危機，只是今場犯錯令他們痛失2分，「古天奴入球後我們犯了錯，一個很嚴重錯誤。我不知道最後誰應為此負責，總而言之最後踼成1：1就是無運。」（Goal.com）

Ian Wright slams Liverpool defending as "laughable" and accuses Jurgen Klopp of being "passive-aggressive"

The German is growing irritable after pressing questions over the Reds' continual defensive ineptitude

Ian Wright has slammed Liverpool's defending as "laughable" after another "clanger" cost them against Newcastle.

The Reds were beaten by a long ball down the middle to deny them the three points in the 1-1 draw at St James' Park on Sunday.

Wright is baffled as to how Klopp continues to fail to address his side's Achilles heel.

"Defensively they continue to make such laughable mistakes," Wright wrote in his column with the Sun. "It’s as though no one ever thinks, ‘Hang on a minute, what happens if this breaks down and they come at us?’

"Klopp says he could write a book on defending in two hours, and maybe he could. But doing it in theory is a world away from doing it in practice — and Liverpool certainly aren’t."

Klopp showed signs of irritation after being pushed on his side's issues in the post-match press conference and Wright believes he is now showing his true colours.

"Klopp is showing another side to his character as well," Wright added. "There’s a passive-aggressive side to him — something my media mates are increasingly seeing too — whenever anyone questions Liverpool’s performances.

"Almost a case of ‘How dare you suggest that, you’ve never played the game, what do you know’?. Well, you don’t need to go to India to know a good curry — and you don’t need to be an FA coach to know Liverpool’s defence has been embarrassing at times."
